description: This file is a Flutter app main entry point, defining the main widget, theme, and home screen layout. It structures a minimal UI scaffold with an app bar and a status indicator for backend checking.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: The root widget of the Flutter application, setting up theme and home screen.

classes.name: _HomeScreen
classes.description: A stateless widget representing the main screen with a minimal UI layout.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point that launches the app.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for MyApp and _HomeScreen.
